title: The Sea Beast
writer: Herman Melville, Bess Meredyth, Rupert Hughes
actors: John Barrymore, Dolores Costello, George O'Hara
plot: This silent movie is based on Melville's classic Moby Dick. Ahab and his brother compete for the affections of minister's daughter Esther. But the great white whale has been eluding the harpooners, bearing many scars of failed att...
